summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2P crypto exchange payment gateway flow. All features working correctly - Demo Shop connection, invoice creation, SelectOperatorPage, payment step, trader confirmation, and customer success status.

minor.issue: Demo Shop uses 'secret_key' field but backend expects 'api_secret' field for signature verification. The merchant has both fields with different values.

action_items: Consider standardizing the secret key field name in merchant schema (api_secret vs secret_key)
critical_code_review_comments: SelectOperatorPage.jsx is well-structured with clean payment interface without crypto terminology
Payment method filters work correctly with emoji icons (⚡ СБП, 💳 Карта)
Operators are sorted by price (cheapest first) with 'Лучшая цена' badge on best price
All UI text is in Russian as expected
Payment step shows requisites (card number/phone) with copy buttons
Chat with operator feature is available
Success status shows credited amount correctly
seed_data_creation: Updated merchant1 with secret_key field for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment gateway flow fully tested and working. Demo Shop at /shop connects to merchant API, creates invoices, and opens payment page. SelectOperatorPage shows operators sorted by price with payment method filters. Complete flow: merchant creates invoice -> customer selects operator -> customer pays -> trader confirms -> customer sees success.

demo_shop_connection.details: Demo Shop connects to merchant API with API key and secret key, loads payment methods

invoice_creation.details: Invoice created via /v1/invoice/create with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification

select_operator_page.details: Shows 'Пополнение счёта: X ₽' header, payment method filters (Все способы, СБП, Карта), operators sorted by price with 'Лучшая цена' badge

payment_step.details: Shows amount to pay, requisites (card number/phone), copy buttons, timer, 'Я оплатил' button, chat option

mark_as_paid.details: Clicking 'Я оплатил' changes status to 'waiting', shows 'Проверяем платёж' with 1-15 minute estimate

trader_confirmation.details: Trader sees trade in /trader/sales with 'Покупатель отметил оплату!' message, can click 'Подтвердить' to confirm

customer_success.details: Customer sees 'Платёж зачислен!' with green checkmark and credited amount
